title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Rishi and Tanuja rush to hide after seeing Raj in the court veranda. They fear that the news of the impeding divorce could have an adverse effect on Raj's health.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: After getting slapped by Raj, Rishi slyly twists his story and hides from his father the truth about his intention to divorce Tanuja.

title: Noyontara
desc: Noyontara's ability to communicate with spirits enables her to bridge the gap between realms and uncover veiled truths. Her marriage into the Sengupta family sets in motion a series of revelations.

title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di
desc: Focused Heer encounters privileged Nawab, sparking an unexpected romance. Their journey unfolds amidst challenges, revealing a tale of love intertwined with deception and emotional turmoil.

title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
desc: Emboldened by Dhairya's encouragement, Aarambhi resolves to battle for Vihaan's affections. Later, Dua and Dhairya orchestrate a theatrical ploy to remain contenders, securing Vikrant's approval.

title: Mangal Lakshmi
desc: Mangal sets off on a journey to find an ideal match for Lakshmi. However, love and trials test their sisterhood, unveiling destiny's power.

title: Do Duniya Ek Dil
desc: Tech visionary Shivaay shuns modern technology after he falls victim to a massive scam. However, his beliefs are tested when he falls in love with Aadhya, a prominent digital influencer.

title: Mahadev & Sons
desc: Mahadev's principled approach to guiding his family with a firm hand unintentionally sows the seeds of rebellion, ushering in an era of generational discord.

title: Seher Hone Ko Hai
desc: Seher is a young woman with big dreams, and her mother, Kausar, is determined to overcome societal barriers in her daughter's way.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
desc: Tensions are mounting in the cooking competition as teams fight it out for the top spot.

desc: Leading actresses of Indian television grace the kitchen with their presence whilst the contestants compete to entertain the audience.
